result.text: US checkout requests experienced elevated 503 errors from 14:05 to 14:32 UTC because the Redis cache cluster exhausted memory during a catalog promotion. No completed orders were lost, although some customers retried.

The payroll export was delivered at 06:18 CT after vendor API rate limits delayed transmission. Internal generation succeeded, calculations were unchanged, and there is no indication that employee data was exposed.

Android 14 devices with biometric login experienced startup crashes in mobile version 4.12, reducing crash-free sessions to 71% for that segment. Rollout stopped at 25%, version 4.11 was restored, and the root cause remains unconfirmed.iOS and earlier Android versions were unaffected.
